name: veil
description: Use the complete Veil CLI workflow through Codex: private contexts, manual or agent work, automatic verification, and approved publication.

interface.shortDescription: The complete private Veil workflow in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Open a public repository or current checkout as a private local-first workspace, work manually or with the Codex agent harness, automatically verify the current encrypted result, and publish a patch or draft pull request only with confirmation. No public fork is required to begin.
defaultPrompt: Open this public GitHub repository as a private Veil context.
Open a Veil workspace so I can work manually or with the Codex agent harness.
Show the status of my verified Veil result, then help me publish or export it when I approve.
